meaning: n.[物]兰勒,兰利(单位面积上太阳辐射的能通量单位)
examples: Sohryu Asuka Langley is afraid of nothing!
Reader: Langley P. Eide, 33, of Redwood City, California.
But the researchers at Langley think their mechanical system has a number of advantages.
